source: 15-minute pull history only plus current moneyline/run-line book data

coverage.policy: MLB HOT pull history should start at 1:00 AM ET and continue every 15 minutes.

rolling24hAccuracyTarget.policy: Every game receives an optimized winner selection. The 90% target is measured by the rolling 24-hour audit over all optimized individual picks.
rolling24hAccuracyTarget.calibrationPolicy: Market-first probabilities, false-confirmation shrinkage, and limited actionable promotion only for clean market-confirmed leans.

balancedSignalGate.rule: Promote only market-backed rows with no hard block when the normal gate outputs zero.

signalPolicyV13.policy: Audit findings adjust score only. No signal rule removes a required game prediction. Non-official predictions are displayed at the daily slate lock.

accuracyTarget.policy: Every game receives an optimized winner selection. The 90% target is measured by the rolling 24-hour audit over all optimized individual picks.
accuracyTarget.calibrationPolicy: Market-first probabilities, false-confirmation shrinkage, and limited actionable promotion only for clean market-confirmed leans.

balancedSignalGate.rule: Promote only market-backed rows with no hard block when the normal gate outputs zero.

signalPolicyV13.policy: Audit findings adjust score only. No signal rule removes a required game prediction. Non-official predictions are displayed at the daily slate lock.

policy: Every MLB game with convertible 15-minute pull data receives an individual score. The 75% target is measured only by the rolling 24-hour audit of completed actionable picks.
